nasb.text: So the angel who was speaking with me answered and said to me, “Do you not know what these are?” And I said, “No, my lord.”

esv.text: Then the angel who talked with me answered and said to me, “Do you not know what these are?” I said, “No, my lord.”

cnv.text: 那與我說話的天使回答我說：“你不知道這些是甚麼意思嗎？”我說：“我主啊，我不知道。”

ccb.text: 他说：“你不知道吗？”我说：“主啊，我不知道。”
